author: anon-13168fa2
content: Delivered: Created 02-the-methodology/02-tracking-your-work.md. Four sections: (1) 'When Your Head Runs Out of Room' - why memory fails, why agents need tracking even more than humans; (2) 'Build One' - guided issue tracker project as portfolio piece #2 with full design doc and 7 build layers; (3) 'Now Use a Real One: Chainlink' - maps built concepts to Chainlink features, covers sessions/breadcrumbs/subissues/dependencies/smart suggestions/daily workflow; (4) 'The Bigger Picture' - ties tracking back to VDD bead-string and adversarial review. 5 exercises including the meta exercise of tracking the tracker's own remaining work. Updated README.md.
